description: Calibration set 5, 2026-07-03 19:35-19:53 (WOS_BattleReports_FarSeerCalibration_v5.pdf). Marlinman big-panel discriminator + Far Seer T6 infantry + Bradley turn-clock pair + Renee single-lancer/turn-clock pair. NOTE (Martin): FC proc skills (Crystal Shield etc.) trigger on Marlinman for ALL troop tiers - FC skills are account-gated, not tier-gated - so Marlinman is never fully proc-free.

marlinman_battles.hero: Seo-yoon (S1 L5 +25% attack; marksman card inert for infantry army)

T1_pair.note: integer quantization at small counts; consistent with x1.25 within +/-1 kill

skill_pool_discriminator.VERDICT: STAT SKILLS ARE MULTIPLICATIVE - their own factor on the stat, NOT additive with the panel pool. The additive hypothesis (x1.026) is dead.

farseer_battles.note: completes same-tier class triple: T6 Inf 174 / T6 Lan 185 / T6 Mar 202

farseer_battles.hero: Bradley (S1 L3 x1.15 atk, S2 L3, S3 L3 18% DD 2-of-4)

farseer_battles.note: 213/177 = 1.2034 vs no-hero baseline: S1 x1.15 x S3-EV 1.046 fits; S2 Power Shot (+15% DD to Infantry) apparently did NOT apply vs beast - open question

farseer_battles.hero: Renee (lancer; card +111.3 Atk/+111.3 Def to Lancer panel rows; S1 Nightmare Trace L2 80% extra lancer dmg every 2 turns; S2 Dreamcatcher L2 +60% lancer DD to marked)

turn_clock_findings.durations: Tapir vs ~300 T7 inf: Bradley 7x4 and Renee 16x2 agree at T = 31 (S3 fires turns 4,8..28; S1 fires odd turns 1,3..31). Tapir vs ~1000: Bradley 14 procs + Renee 29 procs agree at T = 57-58.
turn_clock_findings.structure: Duration scales ~N^0.58, NOT ~N. So the beast's kills-per-turn GROW with our troop count (~N^0.42) - the DEFENDER's count enters the damage kernel (engagement-width behavior). This also reconciles the total-kills exponent 1.525: per-event attacker exponent is then ~0.95 (near-linear), not 0.525.
turn_clock_findings.single_lancer: 1 protected T6 lancer (Renee-boosted): 14 kills over 31 turns (0.45/turn) with 300-wall; 54 kills over 57.5 turns (0.94/turn) with 1000-wall. Same lancer, same beast - per-turn output doubled with a bigger own-side wall. Another defender/side-count coupling signature.
